title: The Polka-Dot Potion and the Magic Spell
summary: Seeker prepares for a grand expedition by visiting Uncle Grisko with a collection of magical sleep potions. After a busy day of errands—including buying a badger for a baby dog—Seeker shares a strawberry-flavored, blue and yellow polka-dotted drink. By reciting the powerful chant 'Salaiska, Kabuska, Kadoo,' the two friends drift off into a deep, restful slumber.

highlightQuote.text: No, 'cause I got pee on my hands when I was wiping myself, said Seeker.

transcript.text: Tell the story about Seeker and Uncle Grisko.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Seeker and Uncle Grisko.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: So you'll be telling Uncle Grisko, I'll be telling Seeker.
Okay. Do you want to start or should I?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: You should.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, once upon a time... Ding-dong!
Oh, who's there?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Seeker. The real... I could not... the real... Seeker... Seeker!
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: And Uncle Grisko said, 'Oh, hello Seeker. Welcome to my house. Why did you come over today?'
Hello? Seeker? Tell.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Well, Uncle Grisko asked Seeker a question.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: What was that crack?
That was just the air conditioner.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: What did the air conditioner do?
It just went click.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Why did it do that?
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Sometimes things make a sound when they're warming up or cooling down.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: All right, back to our stars and stories.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Well, Uncle Grisko's at his house, and Seeker came to the door, and what did Seeker say?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: I have to go on an expedition, but I need a potion. And I already found the... since we used the black potion, the outer space black potion, I found a glowing... Dad, you think of...
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Izzy
transcript.text: And Seeker said, 'I had bought some new potions over the... I had bought some new sleep potions at the store after I went to... to Atsukeeseet where Isabella lives to get a badger for my... for my baby dog,' said Seeker.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that's all very interesting, said Uncle Grisko. And what do you want to do now?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then I went to the store and bought sleep potions and put them in my potion bag when I got home, and then went potty to go pee-pee, then wiped my bum, then went off to your house.
I see, said Uncle Grisko. Well...
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Then washed my hands at your house.
Oh yes, you're welcome to use my bathroom and wash your hands in my sink if you'd like, said Uncle Grisko.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: No, 'cause I got pee on my hands when I was wiping myself, said Seeker.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I see. That's too bad. Well, go ahead and wash your hands.
I already washed my hands, said Seeker.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh, good. Well, should we try out those sleep potions?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Okay. That's good because I was feeling like it's really time to go to sleep pretty soon, but I'm not that sleepy. I could use something to help me feel sleepy. There's lots of things that could help with that, but a sleep potion's worth a try. And what do the sleep potions look like?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: The sleep potions are blue.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Ah, what a beautiful blue potion, said Uncle Grisko. Can I have a sip of it to try?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: With yellow polka dots.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: With yellow polka dots? Wow. And what does it taste like?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Strawberry.

Mmm. And Uncle Grisko had a sip of the strawberry-flavored blue and yellow polka-dot sleep potion. And he said, 'Wow, well, I don't feel sleepy yet. I think we're missing something. What else are we supposed to do?'
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: And then Seeker remembered about saying the magic spell. What's the magic spell we have to say, Seeker?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Salaiska, Kabuska, Kadoo!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Salaiska, Kabuska, Kadoo. Salaiska, Kabuska, Kadoo. And then all of a sudden, zzzzz... Uncle Grisko fell fast asleep. And did Seeker fall asleep too?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah. Zzzzz.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, we only had time for a short story tonight, so I think that's the end of Stars and Stories.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Salaiska, Salaiska...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Are you saying the spell again? That's a good one. I like those spells you make up, Izzy.

characters.name: Seeker
characters.description: A brave dwarven explorer and mediator, he resides in a glowing castle hub—a multiversal dock for skyships anchored within the skyline of New York City. From this urban sanctum, he conducts silver slime experiments and tends to wandering cats amidst a massive library. Frequently swapping between a red coat and a mystical purple cloak, his braided red beard remains his most eccentric tool, capable of catching small fish. A master of fusion, he combines ancient stone-craft with high-velocity mechanics, utilizing a legendary magic ladder to scale the shifting architecture of the realms. Whether brewing portal potions, harvesting floof-berries in Limbo with gemstone goggles, or aiding Buddy the Mouse, this walnut-loving student of the stars remains the hero who orchestrated the daring rescue of the world.

characters.name: Uncle Grisco
characters.description: A nomadic mole scientist and science teacher, this subterranean inventor resides in a home brimming with wondrous experiments, serving as a devoted confidant to the gopher folk. Within his laboratory of glowing elixirs and prismatic shadows, he fuses volcanic lore with the study of light to translate the planet's restless movements and the scarred history of cosmic craters. A wandering sage who maps both deep tectonic veins and celestial paths, he frequently emerges from his sprawling tunnels to share ancient botanical secrets and astronomical insights with his friend Seeker.

characters.name: Isabella
characters.description: A towering Dimatar scholar and alchemist of Atsukeeseet, Mama Izzy is a clever kiddo at heart and a steadfast guardian of rooftop gardens and intricate dollhouses. Gifted with the power of flight, she navigates the open heights with aquatic grace, her massive frame often shielded by a special protective metal that glimmers even as she descends into the shadows. As a resourceful quartermaster, she employs red flashlights, gold-laced slimes, and pipe cleaners to mend a Lanternshark’s failing light, yet her generosity remains her hallmark; she freely shares her vast library, brokers homes for dragons, and teaches others to find the resonance in their own voices. Her most profound magic resides in her vast, soft blanket—a sanctuary of ultimate coziness—where she remains a brave, quick-witted protector to all who honor her singular request for absolute silence.

characters.name: Baby Dog
characters.description: Seeker's beloved pet who recently received a badger as a gift.

places.name: Uncle Grisko's House
places.description: The cozy setting where the characters meet and the magic potion is sampled.

places.name: The Store
places.description: A versatile apothecary and provisioner where Seeker procures heavy-lidded sleep potions and Hattie guides Victor toward his exhaustive list of non-hat essentials. The eclectic inventory doubles as a grocery for all sizes, where local mice browse for carrots alongside a larder of gluten-free broccoli prized for its refreshing silence. Tucked among these oddities are the Band-Aids that once stirred a flicker of temporary concern in Izzy.

places.name: Atsukeeseet
places.description: The hometown of Isabella, visited by Seeker before arriving at Uncle Grisko's house.
